config.title: Dashboard
config.css: *{box-sizing:border-box}body{margin:0;font-family:system-ui,-apple-system,sans-serif;background-color:#0f111a;color:#e2e8f0}.dashboard{display:flex;height:100vh;overflow:hidden}.sidebar{width:260px;background:#161925;border-right:1px solid #232738;padding:24px;display:flex;flex-direction:column}.brand{font-size:1.25rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin-bottom:40px;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:10px}.nav-item{padding:12px 16px;color:#94a3b8;text-decoration:none;border-radius:8px;margin-bottom:8px;transition:all .2s;font-weight:500;display:block}.nav-item.active,.nav-item:hover{background:#232738;color:#60a5fa}.nav-item.external-link{color:#34d399;border:1px solid rgba(52,211,153,0.2)}.nav-item.external-link:hover{background:rgba(52,211,153,0.1);border-color:#34d399}.main-content{flex:1;padding:32px 32px 100px 32px;overflow-y:auto;position:relative}.header{display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;margin-bottom:32px}.title{font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:600;margin:0;color:#fff}.stats-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(auto-fit,minmax(250px,1fr));gap:24px;margin-bottom:32px}.stat-card{background:#161925;border:1px solid #232738;border-radius:12px;padding:24px}.stat-value{font-size:2rem;font-weight:700;color:#fff;margin:0}.recent-table{width:100%;background:#161925;border-radius:12px;border:1px solid #232738;border-collapse:collapse;overflow:hidden}.recent-table th,.recent-table td{padding:16px 24px;text-align:left;border-bottom:1px solid #232738}.credit-bar{position:fixed;bottom:0;right:0;left:260px;background:rgba(15,17,26,0.85);backdrop-filter:blur(20px);border-top:1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.05);padding:18px 32px;display:flex;justify-content:space-between;align-items:center;z-index:9999}.credit-content{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:12px;color:#475569;font-size:10px;font-weight:bold;letter-spacing:1.5px;text-transform:uppercase}.separator{width:4px;height:4px;background:#334155;border-radius:50%}.version-tag{background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(96,165,250,0.1),rgba(52,211,153,0.1));color:#60a5fa;padding:6px 14px;border-radius:6px;font-size:10px;font-family:monospace;font-weight:bold;border:1px solid rgba(96,165,250,0.15)}
config.js: function initDash(){const anim=(id,s,e,d)=>{let o=document.getElementById(id);let st=null;const f=(t)=>{if(!st)st=t;const p=Math.min((t-st)/d,1);o.innerHTML=Math.floor(p*(e-s)+s).toLocaleString();if(p<1)requestAnimationFrame(f)};requestAnimationFrame(f)};anim('stat1',0,24593,1500);anim('stat2',0,843,1000)}initDash();
